title: Learn Noir in an Afternoon with Harsh Bajpai | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
Learn Noir in an afternoon.

Harsh Bajpai, DevRel Engineer, introduces the fundamentals of Noir and shows how to start building private applications quickly.
